evals.prompt: I changed the `mcp-runtime server deploy` flags and Cobra help text. Sync the docs and agent guidance.
evals.expected_output: Identifies CLI docs, command examples, and golden help snapshots as candidates; verifies behavior from live help or Cobra source before editing; updates the nearest existing docs or AGENTS guidance only where needed; runs or names the relevant golden/doc validation.

evals.prompt: The MCPAccessGrant session matching behavior changed in the platform API. Check whether the repo guidance needs updates.
evals.expected_output: Inspects the API/runtime access contract, CRD/types or tests, and existing docs; updates AGENTS.md or docs that describe grant/session behavior if stale; avoids creating new top-level docs; summarizes source truth and validation searches.

evals.prompt: I only refactored private helper names in a package without changing behavior. Audit whether docs need updates.
evals.expected_output: Checks the diff and nearby docs for exposed behavior; makes no documentation edits when no user-facing or contributor-facing guidance changed; reports the files or searches used to justify leaving docs unchanged.
